name: Swap Sans (Fem)
description:
Okay, seriously? Another undertale related bot? Duh.

Anyways im back YAYY!! (No one cares), so... I didn't plan shit for Kinktober cuz im too lazy for this

Also, you've given the chance to be a villain so I'll put the dead dove tag just incase..
